attributes.action: Allow school pupils to use the toilet during lesson time
attributes.additional_details: Because some students have reasons why then need to go to the toilet and some girls may be on their menstrual cycle and they are not aloud to leave lesson and I do t thank that is fair and I think it is it the right thing to do to let a student go to the toilet because in most jobs you can go to the toilet so why can’t pupils
attributes.background: Allow all schools around the uk to let children use the toilet during their lessons

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Give students the legal right to unrestricted toilet access in school
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760890
